Best Practices for Claude Code Skills

Here are some patterns:

Auto-Retry Hook

#!/bin/bash
# Auto-retry failed commands
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  sleep 2 && "$@"
fi

Test Coverage Skill

A skill that checks test coverage before allowing commits.

---
name: test-coverage
description: Check test coverage before commits
version: "1.0.0"
---
